PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, RUDY PEREZ, ANGEL PEREZ JR., RUDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, BRIGIDO TERMINAL BRASSS & ALUMINIUM COMPANY HOLT, RONALD TIMOTHY $20,981.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,981.00, DEFENDANTS TO PAY RUDY PEREZ $14,000, ANGEL PEREZ $6628 AND RUDY PEREZ JR. $353. COSTS TO PLAINTIFFS.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, RUDY PEREZ, ANGEL PEREZ JR., RUDY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, BRIGIDO HOLT, RONALD TIMOTHY TERMINAL BRASS & ALUMINUM FOUNDRY, INC.
